name: anti-vibe-coding
description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.3.0 — Next.js Stack Knowledge. PRIMEIRA stack knowledge completa em ingles (D15): 15 atoms em knowledge/nextjs/atoms/ extraidos de 9 fontes declaradas com anti-drift clause + verifier batch (94% rastreabilidade, 0 rework rounds). T1 (7): app-router-and-layouts, react-server-components, server-actions-and-mutations, middleware-and-edge, security-stack-specific, react-hooks-and-state. T2 (6): data-fetching-and-cache, rendering-strategies, performance-and-turbopack, testing-strategy, ui-and-styling, error-handling-observability, react-suspense-patterns. T3 (2): pages-router-migration-tips, supabase-integration. DETECTOR: nextjs e react como StackIds distintos; STACK_ID_TO_MATRIX_FOLDER['nextjs']='nextjs' (era 'nodejs-typescript'); probeReact com vite.config+react guard (G8 false-positive); detectMultiStack inclui next.config.{js,ts} como anchor nextjs-especifico. PARSER: format-knowledge-preview.ts regex (?:Por|By) aceita INDEX em EN alem de PT-BR (RF-11, backward-compat). INFRA: THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md (MIT attribution para 6 SKILL.md V2); knowledge/nextjs/INDEX.md (By Cross-Stack Skill / By Tier / By keyword); 2 fixtures (nextjs-app-router-fixture, nextjs-supabase-fixture); 2 E2E (init-v7-nextjs-tracer-bullet 11 testes, init-v7-nextjs-supabase 3 testes). COMPOUND: 2026-05-25-stack-knowledge-extraction-workflow.md — workflow parallel waves + anti-drift + verifier validado em 14 atoms, template reusavel para futuras stacks (Go, Elixir).
